description.value:
A compact, deployable siege device capable of hurling heavy projectiles at enemies. Once set up, it can unleash devastating barrages of ammunition.

Basic: Two-Handed, Affixed, Heavy, Ranged 2d8 (150/600), Reload (attack action), Knockback, Punch, Stagger, Trip

rmeData.masterPerk: You can load a full container of ammunition, e.g. 20 arrows or 50 needles, into the basket. As an action, you pick a point in range and release the basket. Each creature within a 20 ft radius cylinder, 60ft high centered on your point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking a number of weapon damage dice equal to your proficiency bonus on a failed save, or half on a success.
